transcript: Just got off a call with Rohan Mehta from Zylker Tech. He's the VP Engineering there. They're evaluating our tool against two competitors right now. Said budget is around 15 lakhs annually if we go with the enterprise tier.
Woh Priya thi na, Bright Solutions wali, usne bola ki proposal bhej do, unko final decision agle hafte lena hai.
Quick update, spoke to someone at a fintech startup, forgot the name, they seemed interested but haven't shared any specifics yet, just a first conversation.
Deal with Ankit from Verve Logistics is closed, we won it, contract signed for 8 lakhs per year.
Yaar unhone mana kar diya, budget issue tha, Nisha ne bataya ki abhi ke liye nahi hoga, Orion Traders ka deal cancel.
Umm so I talked to a guy, he runs some kind of agency, wants a demo next week, that's about it for now.
Negotiation chal rahi hai Kabir Sharma ke saath, TechNova ke founder hain woh, pricing pe atke hain, wo 5 lakh maang rahe discount mein.
Sent the proposal to Meera at Hansen Retail yesterday, no word back yet, following up Monday.
So this was just a random inbound, don't even know the company name, someone filled the contact form asking for pricing.
Call with Arjun Kapoor, CTO at Skyline Foods, they're comparing us with two other vendors, evaluation phase, no budget discussed yet.
Ravi bola tha ki unka budget 20 lakh hai, par company ka naam nahi pata mujhe abhi, follow up karna hai details ke liye.
Deal is dead, Simran confirmed Larkspur Media went with a competitor, they wanted something cheaper than our 10 lakh quote.
First conversation with someone from an ed-tech company, exchanged numbers, nothing concrete discussed.
Finalize ho gaya sab, Devansh aur uski team ne sign kar diya, Q3 mein onboard karenge, 12 lakh ka annual contract hai Nimbus Cloud ke saath.
They're still deciding internally, spoke with the ops head, forgot her name, comparing three vendors including us, Redwood Systems is the company.
Bas ek missed call tha, call back nahi kiya abhi tak, kuch pata nahi kaun tha.
Proposal bheja Karan Malhotra ko, Fenix Apparel ke procurement head hain, unhone bola pricing thoda high hai, discuss karenge next week negotiation call mein.
Talked to the founder of a small D2C brand, really early stage conversation, just gauging interest, no company name mentioned in the call.
Aditi se baat hui, Solstice Interiors ki owner hain, unhone deal confirm kar diya, 6 lakh ka package liya hai unhone.
Just following up, no new info, still waiting on Meridian Corp's finance team to approve the proposal we sent two weeks back.
Unhone reject kar diya humein, said it's too expensive for a startup like theirs, no name given for the company, just said it's a small SaaS startup.
Yeh naya lead hai, Naveen Choudhary ne LinkedIn pe message kiya, apna startup mention kiya nahi, bas demo maanga hai.
